expectations.text: A handoff markdown file was created
The handoff document is under 100 lines total
The YAML frontmatter has 7 or fewer fields
expectations.evidence: 5 fields: date, git_commit, branch, repository, summary

expectations.text: The Learnings section explains the deadlock root cause inline
expectations.evidence: Line 17-19: Three labeled bullets explain the deadlock constraint, root cause, and why previous fix failed — all inline, no 'just read debug-notes.md'

expectations.text: The References section has 3 or fewer files in the 'read on resume' tier
The document does NOT have a separate 'Recent changes' or 'Artifacts' section
expectations.evidence: Sections are: Tasks, Learnings, Next Step, References

expectations.text: There is a single clear 'Next Step' rather than a numbered list of 5+ items
expectations.evidence: Line 22: Single paragraph with specific recommendation and verification command

expectations.text: The next step recommends a specific fix approach
expectations.evidence: 'Implement fix using sync.Map (simplest, no lock ordering issues)' with validation command

expectations.text: The document does not contain code blocks longer than 10 lines
